steps.title: Compare to circle form
steps.content: A circle in standard form is $$(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=r^2$$ Its center is $(h,k)$.

steps.title: Read the signs carefully
steps.content: The given equation is $$(x+4)^2+(y-6)^2=9$$ Rewrite the first factor as $x-(-4)$, so $h=-4$. The second factor gives $k=6$. The answer is C.
